name: Marta the Innkeeper

dialogues.dialogue: Welcome to my inn, traveler! You look weary from your journey. Would you like to rest?
We have the finest potions and remedies in town. What brings you here?
I have some work that needs doing. Interested in earning some coin?

currDialogue: Welcome to my inn, traveler! You look weary from your journey. Would you like to rest?
